home.title: Soleva — The Swiss solar electric van
home.description: Soleva converts an old van into a solar-powered electric camper. A Swiss demonstrator of sustainable mobility, retrofit and solar energy.

van.title: The solar van — conversion, energy and habitat
van.description: Discover Soleva's technical pillars: electric conversion, on-board solar system and low-carbon mobile habitat.

conversion.title: Electric conversion — retrofitting the Peugeot J9
conversion.description: Retrofitting an old diesel van into a 100% electric vehicle: motor, refurbished batteries and Swiss road certification.

solaire.title: On-board solar system — CSEM & EPFL panels
solaire.description: A 1,350 W deployable photovoltaic roof developed with CSEM and the EPFL PV-Lab to produce the energy of the journey.

habitat.title: Low-carbon mobile habitat — life on board
habitat.description: A comfortable, sober living space designed with recycled, local and durable materials to reduce the impact of travel.

impact.title: Environmental impact — sustainable mobility
impact.description: The impact of the Soleva project: CO₂ reduction, circular economy, retrofit instead of a new vehicle and solar energy.

voyage.title: The journey — Swiss solar tour
voyage.description: Follow Soleva's demonstration across Switzerland, its stops, its events, and invite the van to your own event.

support.title: Support Soleva — donate, sponsor, volunteer
support.description: Support Soleva through a donation, sponsorship or volunteering. Discover our successful crowdfunding campaign at 147%.

about.title: About — the Soleva association
about.description: The story, mission, vision and team of Soleva, a Swiss engineers' project for solar and sustainable mobility.

contact.title: Contact — write to Soleva
contact.description: A question, an idea or an event invitation? Reach the Soleva team through the form or at info@soleva.org.

faq.description: All the answers about the Soleva project: the van, solar technology, support and privacy.

hero.title: The solar electric van
hero.subtitle: Soleva converts an old van into a solar-powered electric camper. A Swiss demonstrator for a new way of traveling, reducing environmental impact, and making the energy transition tangible.

figures.title: The project in figures
figures.subtitle: Concrete data that tells the Soleva story.
figures.disclaimer: Estimated technical figures, currently being validated.

problem.title: Travel has to change.
problem.body: Combustion vehicles consume fossil fuels, generate emissions and require significant industrial production. Soleva explores another path: reusing an existing vehicle, converting it to electric, producing its energy locally through solar power and sharing these learnings with the public.

pillars.title: Three technical pillars
pillars.subtitle: A complete demonstrator, from the motor to the habitat.
pillars.conversion_desc: Extending the life of an old vehicle by replacing the combustion engine with an electric powertrain.
pillars.solar_desc: Producing the energy of the journey directly from the sun, with an innovative deployable photovoltaic roof.
pillars.habitat_desc: A comfortable, sober living space designed to reduce the impact of travel.

press.title: Soleva in the media
press.subtitle: Coverage across French-speaking Switzerland and nationally.

new_start.title: A new beginning
new_start.body: Despite the fire that ravaged the workshop and took Sunny, the first solar van, the Soleva adventure continues. The van's safety systems worked perfectly, proving the reliability of the design. After inspiring thousands of people during the Swiss tour, the team refuses to let this dream die. A new solar van is in preparation, driven by the team's passion and the community's support.
new_start.subtitle: Support the new van

partners.title: Our partners
partners.subtitle: Technical, institutional and academic partners making the project possible.

documentary.title: L'aventure Soleva — the documentary
documentary.subtitle: Premiere on October 4, 2024 at Esplanade de Montbenon, Lausanne

cta.title: Want to learn more about Soleva?
cta.body: A question, an event invitation or a wish to support the project? Write to us.

hero.title: The solar van
hero.subtitle: Three technical pillars combine to make Soleva a demonstrator of sustainable mobility: electric conversion, the on-board solar system and the low-carbon habitat.

service_detail.cta_body: Our team will be happy to answer your technical questions or present the project.
service_detail.disclaimer: Technical specifications are estimated and currently being validated.

hero.title: A concrete environmental impact
hero.subtitle: Soleva is not just a vehicle: it is a demonstration that mobility can be more sober, circular and powered by the sun.

impact.disclaimer: All impact estimates must be validated by Soleva before publication.

cards.carbon_desc: By converting an existing vehicle and powering it with solar energy, the project aims for around 80% lower emissions compared to a new diesel campervan.
cards.circular_desc: The retrofit extends the life of a 1987 vehicle rather than building a new one, avoiding the impact of industrial production.
cards.solar_desc: The energy of the journey is produced directly by the sun thanks to the on-board photovoltaic panels.
cards.awareness_desc: Beyond the technology, Soleva shares its learnings with the public, schools and institutions.

hero.title: A Swiss solar tour
hero.subtitle: Soleva travels across Switzerland to demonstrate solar mobility and meet the public, schools and partners.

voyage.tour_body: The van visited more than 100 towns across Switzerland, from Lausanne to Zurich, through Davos, Lugano and Sion. At each stop, the team shares the technology and the adventure of the project.
voyage.invite_body: Festival, trade fair, school, company or municipality: Soleva can come and present the van and its project. Contact us to explore the possibilities together.
voyage.events_cta: Have an event in mind? Invite Soleva!
voyage.polar_body: Track Soleva's tour in real time via Polar Steps.

hero.title: Support Soleva
hero.subtitle: Soleva advances thanks to a community of volunteers, partners, sponsors and donors. Your support helps develop the vehicle, organize events, document learnings and inspire new solutions for sustainable mobility.

ways.donate_desc: Every contribution directly funds the development of the van, materials and awareness events.
ways.sponsor_desc: Gain visibility on the van, at events, on the website and social media. Partnership packages are available.
ways.volunteer_desc: Join the team and contribute your skills, whether technical, creative or organizational.
ways.share_desc: Follow Soleva on social media and share the project around you to amplify its impact.

crowdfunding.title: A successful crowdfunding
crowdfunding.body: In 2022, Soleva's campaign on Wemakeit exceeded its goal, driven by a loyal community.
crowdfunding.todo: Donation link and tax deductibility to be confirmed with Soleva.

iban.title: Make a donation
iban.body: Donations remain essential to fund the development of the new solar van.

hero.title: The Soleva adventure
hero.subtitle: A project born from a passion for nature and engineering, driven by a team of Swiss engineers.

about.mission_body: Promote solar electric mobility and sustainable travel by transforming an old vehicle into an electric van powered by photovoltaic solar energy.
about.vision_body: Inspire society towards a more sustainable transition in mobility, energy, travel and vehicle design.
about.story_body: Soleva started in 2021 when Curdin Wüthrich, a physics graduate from EPFL, and four friends — all passionate about nature and sustainability — decided to tackle a challenge: convert an old 1987 diesel van into a 100% solar-powered electric camper. The idea came from their shared experience as nature photographers, traveling in fossil-fuel vans while advocating for the environment.
about.team_subtitle: A team of engineers and enthusiasts, supported by dozens of volunteers.
about.members_subtitle: A team of engineers and enthusiasts, supported by dozens of volunteers.
about.press_subtitle: National media coverage in Switzerland and beyond.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.intro: This policy describes how Soleva handles your personal data, in accordance with the Swiss FADP and the European GDPR.
privacy.data_body: Data submitted via the contact form (name, email, organization, message) is used solely to respond to your request.
privacy.analytics_body: We use Google Analytics 4 in consent mode. No analytics data is collected before your explicit consent.
privacy.cookies_body: You can change your cookie choice at any time via the link in the footer.
privacy.rights_body: You have the right to access, rectify and delete your data. Contact us at info@soleva.org.
privacy.todo: Full privacy text to be validated by the client.
